name: Sausage Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the sausage to a thickness of 1/8 inch and cut into quarters or 1/2 x 1/2-inch squares.
2. Roll out the puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
3. Arrange the sausage pieces on one half of the puff pastry, placing 2 together and spaced about 1 inch apart.
4. Brush between stacks with egg mixture.
5. Brush the remaining half of the puff pastry with egg mixture and fold over the sausage half.
6. Press to seal between stacks and cut with a knife or pastry wheel.
7. Pierce the top of each package with a fork.
8. Cover and chill thoroughly.
9. Place onto a parchment-lined baking sheet.
10. Bake at 400 degrees until lightly browned.
11. Remove from oven and serve warm.
